name: okra
description: Reverse Tornado OKR workflow skill for running measurable goals with anti-goal guardrails.

interface.shortDescription: Run goals as measured OKR loops with anti-goal guardrails.
interface.longDescription: Okra packages the Reverse Tornado OKR skill plus local eval and review infrastructure for testing Claude and Codex behavior against recurring, measurable goals.
defaultPrompt: Turn this goal into a Reverse Tornado OKR loop.
Create an operating runbook for this measurable goal.
Review this OKR loop for freshness and guardrail gaps.
